comments: Love how this puts real power in the hands of users instead of VCs. The veToken model is such a game changer!
Finally a DEX that actually values community input and long-term holdings. This is how DeFi should work!
The yield potential through longer locks sounds incredibly compelling. Can't wait to see how this shapes the future of governance!
content:
Everyone's chasing the next memecoin. The real revolution? How we govern value.

MarbMarket just became the first veDEX on MegaETH. No presale. No VCs. Just a fair launch that puts power in your hands.

Lock MARB → gain veTokens → vote where rewards flow → protocols pay bribes for your attention.

The MARB flywheel turns your voting power into actual yield. Longer locks = more influence + more rewards. Not just another DEX. A system where your choices compound.

LP farming meets community governance. Projects compete for your votes. You decide the direction.

Check the real deal: x.com/Marb_market

What's your ve(3,3) strategy?
